name: alwenda-city-super-app-mvp
description: Production-ready MVP foundation for Alwenda, an AI-powered city super app.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html clear-cache.html dist/ && cp -R src dist/ && cp -R locales dist/ && cp -R auth dist/ && cp -R terms privacy cookies safety dist/ && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp sw.js dist/ && ([ -f env.js ] && cp env.js dist/ || true)
